features.description: Amount from the immediately preceding transaction for entity name_orig.
features.name: previous_transaction_amount

features.description: Count of available prior transactions for entity name_orig, capped at 5.
features.name: prior_5_transaction_count

features.description: Count of available prior transactions for entity name_orig, capped at 10.
features.name: prior_10_transaction_count

features.description: Sum of transaction amounts over the prior 5 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_5_amount_sum

features.description: Mean transaction amount over the prior 5 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_5_amount_mean

features.description: Population standard deviation of transaction amounts over the prior 5 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_5_amount_std

features.description: Sum of transaction amounts over the prior 10 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_10_amount_sum

features.description: Mean transaction amount over the prior 10 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_10_amount_mean

features.description: Population standard deviation of transaction amounts over the prior 10 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_10_amount_std

features.description: Elapsed seconds since the prior transaction for entity name_orig.
features.name: seconds_since_previous_transaction

features.description: Unique name_dest values seen over the prior 5 transactions for entity name_orig.
features.name: prior_5_unique_name_dest_count

features.description: Unique name_dest values seen over the prior 10 transactions for entity name_orig.
